message: claimed a loop/fleet/iteration completed or all agents passed, but no gate was run (loop_lint.py / a test / a verifier command) in the last 6 tool uses — exit on RECOMPUTED gate state, never on a model done-claim. Run the gate and quote its pass/fail, or say it is unverified.

this prompt describes a self-correcting / iterate-until-it-passes / fan-out automation — apply loop-engineering BEFORE building: name the generator + a SEPARATE verifier, a concrete machine-checkable gate, a stop condition, and a numeric budget cap, then run loop_lint.py on the spec. No gate, or generator==verifier, means it is not a loop — just an open-ended spin.
